name: Neighborgood Partners
description_short: HUD-approved nonprofit housing counselor and community development organization serving the Delmarva Peninsula since 1976, offering homeownership education, foreclosure prevention, and financial coaching.
description_long:
NeighborGood Partners (formerly NCALL) is a nonprofit community development organization that has served families and individuals across the Delmarva Peninsula since 1976. The organization is a HUD-approved housing counseling agency with deep roots in Delaware, particularly in Kent and Sussex counties, and operates as a certified Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI).

The organization offers a comprehensive suite of free and low-cost consumer services including pre-purchase homeownership education, foreclosure prevention counseling, one-on-one financial coaching through their StandByMe partnership, and financial education workshops. They also provide the E-Home America online education course, a Central Delaware Saves matching savings program, and serve as a resource for individuals navigating the home buying and financial planning process. Beyond consumer services, they operate a loan fund for nonprofit and for-profit housing development, provide technical assistance for USDA self-help housing programs across 21 northeastern states, and lead the Restoring Central Dover neighborhood revitalization initiative.

NeighborGood Partners distinguishes itself through its dual focus on direct consumer help and systemic community development. Unlike traditional credit counselors, they combine individual financial coaching with real estate development expertise, developer consulting for affordable housing projects, and a community investment loan fund. Their HUD-approved status and CDFI certification provide legitimacy and access to specialized funding mechanisms. They are locally embedded in Dover and the broader Delmarva region, operating from a community-driven approach that includes resident input in revitalization planning.

The organization is most beneficial for individuals specifically seeking housing-focused counseling rather than general debt or credit repair, and for nonprofits developing affordable housing. However, their geographic focus on Delaware (particularly Dover and the Delmarva Peninsula) limits accessibility for consumers outside this region. Their service offerings are strong for homeownership preparation and foreclosure prevention, but they do not address broader consumer finance needs like credit repair, debt consolidation, or emergency lending.
pros: HUD-approved housing counseling agency with verified credential and compliance standards
Certified Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) by U.S. Department of Treasury
Offers free or low-cost one-on-one financial coaching through StandByMe partnership
Foreclosure prevention counseling specifically designed for households in default or crisis
Central Delaware Saves matching savings program accelerates progress on multiple financial goals
Technical assistance for USDA self-Help Housing programs across 21-state northeast region demonstrates scope and expertise
Long operational history since 1976 demonstrates stability and community trust
cons: Geographic service area limited primarily to Delaware (Kent and Sussex counties), with some regional services; not accessible to consumers outside Delmarva Peninsula
Website does not clearly specify whether services are completely free or if there are fees for certain programs like financial coaching
No mention of availability for credit repair, debt consolidation, or broader credit-building services—housing-focused only
Limited information about counselor qualifications, response times, or availability for scheduling appointments
Services appear to be primarily in-person at employment centers and education sites, limiting flexibility for remote consumers
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Delaware seeking step-by-step guidance and education on the home purchase process
Homeowners facing foreclosure or default in Delaware seeking prevention counseling and application assistance
Individuals in Delaware interested in matched savings programs to fund home purchase, education, business startup, or debt payoff
Nonprofit organizations developing affordable housing projects seeking developer consulting and technical expertise
diagnosis: NeighborGood Partners is best for Delaware residents specifically seeking HUD-approved housing counseling, homeownership education, or foreclosure prevention rather than general credit or debt services. The main caveat is geographic limitation—services are concentrated in the Delmarva Peninsula, making them inaccessible for consumers outside Delaware, and the organization does not address credit repair, debt consolidation, or emergency lending needs.
services: Foreclosure prevention and default counseling with application assistance
One-on-one financial coaching through StandByMe partnership
Financial education workshops at employment centers and higher education sites
E-Home America online home buyer education course
Central Delaware Saves 1:1 matching savings program
Community Development Financial Institution loan fund for affordable housing and community facilities
Developer consulting for nonprofit affordable housing projects
Technical assistance for USDA Rural Development Self-Help Housing programs (21-state region)
Restoring Central Dover neighborhood revitalization planning and implementation
The Launcher Program small business startup education and support (Dover)
Community development and neighborhood investment services
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
meta_description: HUD-approved housing counselor serving Delmarva Peninsula since 1976 with homeownership education, foreclosure prevention, and financial coaching.
